use sqlx::PgPool;

async fn get_all_users(pool: &PgPool) -> Result<Vec<User>, sqlx::Error> {
    // BAD: fetch_all with no LIMIT — unbounded memory for large tables
    sqlx::query_as::<_, User>("SELECT id, name, email FROM users")
        .fetch_all(pool)
        .await
}

struct User {
    id: i64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
}
